releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
[release] v2.8.4, check the CHANGELOG.md for details

- memory: avoid stats reads during preparation
- vss: suppress unused sqlite OPFS VFS warnings
- memory: guard active preparation reuse

- agents: add review follow-up skill

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
[release] v2.8.3, check the CHANGELOG.md for details

- featured-image: upgrade generation to Wan 2.7
- vss: add startup event replay gate and observation-based dirty tracking

- featured-image: harden Wan 2.7 generation flow
- vss: preserve vault event verification

- featured-image: add Wan 2.7 upgrade spec
- vss: update architecture docs for observation-based dirty tracking

- vss: add coverage for startup replay gate and observation logic

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
[release] v2.8.2, check the CHANGELOG.md for details

- memory: add guarded manual Memory actions and token compatibility

- pagelet: suppress empty prepared findings and show cache diagnostics
- PR review findings — dead code removal, semantics restore, test coverage

- settings: route memory controls through shared action guard

- add v2.8.1 feedback fix plan

- add regression coverage for memory actions and prepared-findings flow

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
[release] v2.8.1, check the CHANGELOG.md for details

- pagelet: stabilize discovery and chat rendering

- archive superseded planning records
- readme: add platform demo videos

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
[release] v2.8.0, check the CHANGELOG.md for details

- settings: add legal about links

- license: migrate client source to AGPL
- release: publish legal release assets

- agents: update PA planning workflows

- Starting with version 2.8.0, the client source is licensed under AGPL-3.0-only.
- Historical releases are not relicensed retroactively.
- This release introduces no account system, license key, checkout flow, feature lock, hosted commercial service, or paid entitlement check.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
v2.7.0

AI Insight, Memory Extraction, Action Mode, and SQLite WASM release line.

Pagelet now includes the async result and related-note flow, bubble quick access, panel/tab routing, and release docs for the v2.7 user guide.

README and README-CN now document the official @sqlite.org/sqlite-wasm dependency, and the repo-local Personal Assistant review skill is included for release-readiness checks.

Validation: git diff --check; source DOM injection scan; make deploy; npm run audit:bundle.
